title: A subclass should not be in the same except statement as its parent class
description: It's a code smell when a subclass is in the same except statement as its parent class. This can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Subclass is in the same except statement as its parent class.
recommendation: Move the subclass to a separate except block.
why_is_this_an_issue: A subclass should not be in the same exception handling block as its parent class to avoid unexpected behavior.
how_to_fix: Move the subclass to a separate exception handling block.
